---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new skill, output section, renderer option, CLI command, or MCP tool
title: "feat: <short description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: Aboudjem
---

## Problem / motivation

<!-- What limitation or friction are you running into?
     "I want to do X but currently Y happens" is the ideal format. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- How would you like it to work? Be concrete: new CLI flag, new JSON field,
     new skill command, new output section, etc. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why you prefer the proposed one. -->

## Which track(s) does this affect?

- [ ] Offline single-file HTML output
- [ ] CLI (`recap render` / `recap validate`)
- [ ] Claude Code skill (`/recap`, `/recap session`, `/recap setup`, `/recap validate`)
- [ ] MCP server (`render_recap_html` tool)
- [ ] Next.js hosted track (`apps/recap-web`)
- [ ] Agent pipeline (adding / changing one of the 13 specialist agents)

## Acceptance criteria

<!-- Optional but helpful. How would we know this feature is working correctly?
     A before/after example or a test case description is ideal. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Screenshots, links to related issues, or content JSON examples. -->
